content.en:
"If you give Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm some more time, then the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm can give birth to some half-step domain ancestors, and even give birth to another Returning Realm half-step domain ancestor combat power, then it will be much easier to deal with the Devouring Clan!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's a pity that the Devourers can't wait.

And the Devourer he copied and occupied had no identity, and the other Devourers would not listen to his arrangements and suggestions.

If he dares to talk nonsense, he will definitely be killed.

"Ten days later, we will go to attack the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, everyone must go, if anyone does not go, our four great emperor ancestors will kill whom!"

The War Emperor threatened.

He can't do it if he doesn't threaten, because some Devourers like to live a sneaky life, and they don't want to prove the battle, and they want to wait for the other Devourers to defeat him, and then he will appear to clean up the mess and happily devour the fruits of victory.

If everyone in the Devouring Clan thinks like this, then how can they still attack the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm?

"Yes!"

One by one, the Devouring Clan responded, and no one dared not agree.

The plan was drawn up, and one by one the Devourers left, going back to prepare.

Ten days later, they departed.

......

Xuan Xuan to the ancient realm.

Ye Tian's body naturally knew the movement of the Devouring Clan for the first time, and immediately frowned.

Immediately, he summoned the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, held a meeting, and notified the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain and Jinchen Dao Ancestor of them.

Windy Mountain.

One by one, a half-step domain ancestor descended here, and almost all the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain had arrived.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, what exactly are you summoning us for?"

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, is there something big wrong?"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, we are already here, if there is anything, hurry up and say it!"

......

After the half-step domain ancestors arrived, they asked one by one.

Ye Tian saw that the people were almost here, so he spoke: "Everyone, the Devouring Clan is coming to attack our Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm!"

"Really?"

Jin Chen Daozu hurriedly asked.

"It's true, the information is 100% correct, and as for the source, you don't need to be overdone!"

Ye Tiandao.

It is impossible for him to say the source, and he can't say that he can copy the body of any living being, as long as the other party's realm does not exceed his own.

So what's the point?

Everyone is in danger, even afraid of him!

Because he can turn into someone else at any time, such a threat is too great, maybe other half-step domain ancestors will come to resist him!

The half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain asked one by one whether the news was true, but Ye Tian only answered in the affirmative, but never revealed the source.

At last.

Ye Tiandao: "Ten days later, you will know, prepare in advance, there is no harm, isn't it?"

Many half-step domain ancestors nodded, there was indeed no harm in preparing in advance, even if the news was fake, they would have nothing to lose.

Subsequently.

Black Wind Mountain revealed the news to the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the many forces in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

As a result, one by one the forces began to prepare.

In fact, most of the forces have been preparing for a long time, and if something happens, they will apply those preparations at any time.

So now, they're just more prepared.

In addition to the half-step domain ancestors, those invincible Dao Ancestors united one by one, preparing to use the control of the Great Array to fight against the Devouring Clan's Half-Step Domain Ancestors, while the Supreme Dao Ancestors united to fight against the invincible Dao Ancestors of the Devouring Clan.

As for the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors and the weaker Dao Ancestors, they couldn't help at all, and the only thing they could do was to hide and not be affected.

And Ye Tian did not put his relatives in the human world, but in the territory of the human race in the outside world.

Because the Devourer only devours the world, and the human world is also one of the worlds, it is even more dangerous if it is placed in the human world.

And on those territory stars from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, it was safer, because the Devouring Clan had no interest in these stars and would not attack.

This time, Ye Tian was a little selfish, and did not let his wife, sister, and a pair of children participate in the war, with his current status, even if he did, Black Wind Mountain would not say anything.

Although Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue really wanted to participate in the war, Ye Tian knew very well that the half-step domain ancestors would fall at any time, and the invincible Dao Ancestors had no hope of saving their lives at all, and once they were unlucky, a group of invincible Dao Ancestors would die.

Time passes day by day, and the ten days will soon come.

Day 10.

A half-step domain ancestor hid his figure, hiding in the chaotic void outside the Xuan Void to the Ancient Realm.

If the Devouring Clan really arrived, they were prepared to place the battlefield in the Chaos Void instead of the Void to the Ancient Realm.

After all, if so many half-step domain ancestors fought in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, they would cause tremendous damage to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

If they really can't resist it, they will definitely retreat to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm and fight with the Devouring Clan in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, which is also something that can't be helped.

Time passed little by little, and the half-step domain ancestors were a little nervous, and those invincible Dao ancestors were even more nervous.

Once the war starts, it will not be a small fight, but a real life-and-death struggle, I don't know how many invincible Dao Ancestors, Supreme Dao Ancestors have fallen, and even half-step domain ancestors will fall.

For many Dao Ancestors, they preferred that the information this time was fake.

Ten days have passed, and another half day has passed.

At this time, the void in the distance was turbulent, and figures emerged one after another.

"Devourer, here!"

Jin Chen Daozu spoke.

This is enough to prove that the intelligence is correct, the Devouring Clan has really come to invade the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

"I didn't expect the information of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor to be true!"

Jin Chen Daozu was very surprised, no matter how he thought about it, he couldn't guess how he got the information.

He knew that Ye Tian had a clone, but even if the clone went to the Devouring Realm to die, there was no way to get information!

After all, those Devouring Clans are also intelligent races, and they will not be so stupid to reveal information to Ye Tian.

Moreover, the Devouring Clan has a half-step domain ancestor in the One Realm, and it is even more nonsense to want to sneak in and eavesdrop on the plan.

Therefore, he couldn't think of any way Ye Tian used to obtain information.

Jin Chen Daozu didn't think much about it, the war was the most important thing at this moment.

If the Devouring Clan could not be defeated, the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm would no longer exist, and the small realm of the Black Wind Mountain would not exist.

At that time, the foundation of Black Wind Mountain will inevitably be gone.

"Mountain Lord, the Devouring Clan has arrived!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor sent a message to the Lord of Fengshan Mountain.

"Okay, I got it!"

The Wind Mountain Lord summoned him.

Immediately, a figure tearing through the space descended, it was the Wind Mountain Lord.
